# CWE-270 — Privilege Context Switching Error (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-270-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Safe: saves and restores the request principal after privileged work.
func RunMaintenanceJob(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	original := c.GetString("effective_user")
	defer c.Set("effective_user", original)
	c.Set("effective_user", "maintenance")
	db.Exec("DELETE FROM stale_sessions")
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"done": true})
}
